sections.heading: Let Your Insurance Support Your Recovery
body: The cost of treatment should never be a barrier to the care you deserve. We are here to help you navigate your coverage so you can focus entirely on your recovery. Our team specializes in maximizing private insurance benefits to ensure your clinical stay at our Des Moines drug rehab is fully supported. Call us today to verify your benefits. 100% free.

sections.heading: What Cocaine Addiction Looks Like
body: Cocaine addiction is driven by a cycle of intense highs, crashes, and strong cravings. The effects wear off quickly, which often leads to repeated use or binge patterns. Over time, this can turn into compulsive cocaine use, where it becomes difficult to stop even when it affects mood and daily life. Many people experience anxiety, irritability, and/or depression during the crash, which increases the urge to use again. Symptoms of cocaine addiction include:

According to the National Institute on Drug Abuse ( NIDA ) , cocaine use can lead to significant changes in the brain’s reward system, making cravings stronger and relapse more likely without treatment. Structured cocaine addiction treatment helps break this cycle and build long-term stability.

items.title: Repeated binge use followed by crashes
Using cocaine to cope with stress or low mood

sections.heading: Medical Alcohol Detox in Des Moines
body: Cocaine withdrawal is often described as a “crash,” but it can be more intense than expected. After stopping use, many individuals experience fatigue, depression, anxiety, irritability, and strong cravings that can begin within hours. While cocaine withdrawal is not typically life-threatening, the emotional and psychological symptoms can be severe, especially during the first few days. Many people struggle with lack of motivation and difficulty sleeping, which can quickly lead to relapse.

In some cases, the crash phase may include intense depression or suicidal thoughts, making it difficult to manage safely without support. This is one of the main reasons people return to cocaine use shortly after trying to stop.

sections.heading: Managing Cocaine Withdrawal Symptoms Safely:
body: Medical detox at Des Moines Wellness provides a safe, structured environment to manage withdrawal and stabilize both mood and energy levels. With 24/7 clinical support, monitoring, and therapeutic care, our detox helps reduce the intensity of symptoms and lowers the risk of immediate relapse. We offer:

items.title: Mood Stabilization
items.text: Support for depression, low mood, and emotional crashes that occur after stopping cocaine use.

items.title: Sleep & Anxiety Support
items.text: Helping manage insomnia, restlessness, and anxiety during the early withdrawal phase.

items.title: Cravings & Relapse Prevention
items.text: Clinical support and strategies to reduce intense cocaine cravings and prevent immediate relapse.

items.title: 24/7 Clinical Monitoring
items.text: Continuous supervision to ensure safety and provide real-time support during detox and stabilization.

sections.heading: Cocaine Addiction Treatment After Detox in Des Moines
body: Detox helps you stabilize, but it doesn’t address the cravings and behaviors behind cocaine addiction. Without continued care, relapse is common. At Des Moines Wellness Center, we transition you into structured rehab focused on coping skills and trigger management for long-term sobriety: We offer on-site:

items.title: Residential Inpatient
items.text:
Immersive Stabilization
Step into a structured, 24/7 environment where you can focus fully on recovery. This level of care helps you break the cycle of cocaine use and build a strong foundation away from daily triggers.

items.title: Outpatient (PHP & IOP)
items.text:
Back to Real Life
Continue treatment while living at home in Des Moines. These programs provide ongoing support as you apply coping skills, manage cravings, and rebuild daily routines.

items.title: Clinical Aftercare & Alumni
items.text:
Staying Sober Long-Term
Recovery from cocaine addiction is ongoing. Our aftercare planning and alumni support help you stay connected, maintain progress, and prevent relapse over time.

sections.heading: Dual Diagnosis Treatment for Cocaine Addiction
sections.subheading: Treating addiction and mental health together
body: Cocaine addiction is often closely linked to underlying mental health conditions such as depression, anxiety, and mood instability. Which is called a dual diagnosis . Many people use cocaine to boost energy or cope with stress, but over time this can lead to dependence and worsening mental health symptoms.

At Des Moines Wellness Center, our dual diagnosis treatment in Iowa addresses both cocaine addiction and co-occurring mental health conditions at the same time. Treating only the substance use without addressing depression or anxiety can increase the risk of relapse, especially during the crash phase. Through structured, evidence-based therapy, we help you reduce cravings and build healthier ways to cope without relying on cocaine.

sections.heading: Medically Reviewed By Wesley Starlin, LMHC
body: Wesley Starlin is the Executive Director at Des Moines Wellness Center with over 15 years of experience in behavioral health and addiction treatment.

sections.heading: We’re Here to Listen When You’re Ready
body: Taking the first step is often the hardest, but you don’t have to do it by yourself. Whether you have a quick question about our Des Moines rehab or just need to hear a supportive voice, our team is available 24/7. We provide a safe, confidential space to discuss your options, verify your private insurance, and help you find the right path forward.

sections.heading: Cocaine Rehab and Detox in Des Moines, Iowa
sections.subheading: Structured care to stop cravings and stabilize recovery
body: Cocaine addiction is driven by cravings, crashes, and repeated use. It’s hard to stop without structure. Des Moines Wellness Center provides a premier cocaine rehab in the heart of Iowa with clinical support from day one. We offer cocaine detox and stabilization, followed by residential and outpatient treatment (PHP and IOP). The goal is simple: reduce cravings, and build long-term recovery. Our programs use CBT, DBT, and dual diagnosis care to address both addiction and mental health. We focus on real triggers, real behaviors, and real-life recovery.

As part of Quadrant Health Group , our care is backed by 10+ years of addiction treatment experience. That means structured programming, experienced staff, and consistent clinical standards. We provide cocaine addiction treatment in Iowa with easy access from I-35, I-80, and I-235, and close to Des Moines International Airport. We also offer insurance-friendly admissions and same-day availability, so you can start treatment without delay.

sections.heading: Let’s Build a Life You Don’t Need to Escape
body: Don’t let the weight of addiction decide your future. Whether you are seeking help for yourself or a loved one, our Des Moines admissions team is ready to provide the direct answers you need to move forward. We conduct a professional clinical assessment to find the best program for your needs while securing your private insurance benefits and job protection. Fill out the form below to get started, and a member of the team will reach out shortly.
